items.title: Presentation: Are We Ready for the Next Cyber Security Crisis Like Log4shell?
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Are We Ready for the Next Cyber Security Crisis Like Log4shell?. Soroosh Khodami discusses why we aren't ready for the next Log4Shell.

items.title: Article: Optimization in Automated Driving: From Complexity to Real-Time Engineering
items.summaryShort: Article: Optimization in Automated Driving: From Complexity to Real-Time Engineering. In this article, author Avraam Tolmidis discusses technical architecture of autonomous vehicles, with focus on optimization techniques like context-aware

items.title: Java News Roundup: GraalVM Build Tools, EclipseLink, Spring Milestones, Open Liberty, Quarkus
items.summaryShort: Java News Roundup: GraalVM Build Tools, EclipseLink, Spring Milestones, Open Liberty, Quarkus. This week's Java roundup for March 23rd, 2026, features news highlighting: GA releases of GraalVM Native Build Tools 1.0 and EclipseLink 5.0; the

items.title: FOSDEM 2026: Intro to WebTransport - the Next WebSocket?!
items.summaryShort: FOSDEM 2026: Intro to WebTransport - the Next WebSocket?!. Max Inden recently explored in a talk at FOSDEM 2026 how the upcoming WebTransport protocol and Web API enhance WebSocket capabilities.

items.title: Google Unveils AppFunctions to Connect AI Agents and Android Apps
items.summaryShort: Google Unveils AppFunctions to Connect AI Agents and Android Apps. In a move to transform Android into an "agent-first" OS, Google has introduced new early beta features to support a task-centric model in which apps provide functional build

items.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
items.summaryShort: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round. The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

items.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
items.summaryShort: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris. Mistral aims to start operating the data center by the second quarter of 2026.

items.title: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales
items.summaryShort: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales. As AI floods software development with code, Qodo is betting the real challenge is making sure it actually works.
